meaning: adj.不生育的,不孕的,贫瘠的,没有结果的,无益的,单调的,无聊的,空洞的n.荒地
examples: The land was barren and infertile.
He wants to use the water to irrigate barren desert land.
That's probably the most bare, bleak, barren and inhospitable island I've ever seen.
The Anti Atlas around Tafraoute has rugged, barren rocks and lush green valleys aplenty.
Spewing volcanoes and forbidding lava fields make for a land of beautiful, barren expanses and infinite adventure.
